headline: Sweet, Sour and Spicy: General Mills Taps into Flavor Trends with New Gushers, Fruit by the Foot and Fruit Roll-Ups Varieties
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 06, 2026--General Mills is tapping into the season’s hottest taste trends, unleashing an irresistible lineup up of new fruit snacks designed to thrill the taste buds and ignite social feeds. From viral sour challenges to sweet-and-spicy snack hacks trending across TikTok, fans have been remixing their favorite fruit snacks, and now General Mills is giving them exactly what they’ve been looking for. thumbnail.caption: Gushers Super Sour and Gushers Sweet & Fiery bring mouth-puckering sour and deliciously sweet-heat to the candy aisle, marking Gushers’ first entry into the category.
